headline: Ford Recalls 422K Vehicles over Wiper Issue, Reuters Reports
summary: Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) is included among the 15 Blue Chip Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 7, Reuters reported that Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) is recalling 422,613 vehicles in the U.S. due to a windshield wiper issue, according to the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration. The recall includes Lincoln Navigator and Ford Expedition SUVs, […]

headline: Ford Truck Headwinds Test F-150 Franchise And Investor Valuation Thesis
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) is contending with disruptions after a fire at key aluminum supplier Novelis affected material availability for its F-150 and F-Series trucks. The company is waiting on U.S. tariff relief decisions, as new rules increase exposure to higher input costs for core vehicle lines. A wide-scale recall involving hundreds of thousands of Ford trucks and SUVs adds safety, repair, and reputational pressures at the same time. For you as an investor, this news hits directly at the...
